classes.name: DEPLOYMENT_OWNED
classes.reviewPurpose: Deployment-created result files and installer logs retained on the orchestrator.

classes.name: INSTALLER_LOGS
classes.reviewPurpose: Vendor installer logs if the installer writes them or if silent arguments specify one.

classes.name: WINDOWS_APPLICATION
classes.reviewPurpose: Human review of app installation events after failures.

classes.name: WINDOWS_SYSTEM
classes.reviewPurpose: Human review of reboot, service, or MSI infrastructure events.

classes.name: WINDOWS_SECURITY
classes.reviewPurpose: Audit-integrity review only; never clear or mutate.

classes.name: POWERSHELL_OPERATIONAL
classes.reviewPurpose: Human review of remoting/script activity when authorized.

classes.name: WINRM_REMOTE_MANAGEMENT
classes.reviewPurpose: Human review of remoting connectivity and authentication events.

classes.name: SECURITY_PRODUCT_OR_EDR
classes.reviewPurpose: Human review by security/tool owners only; no bypass guidance.

classes.name: FILE_SHARE_AND_NETWORK_ACCESS
classes.reviewPurpose: Human review of SMB/share access, DNS, and path validation failures.

classes.name: AUDIT_INTEGRITY_EVENTS
classes.reviewPurpose: Escalate any clearing, suppression, or tamper indicators.
